task_description: Comprehensive AI agent upgrade for Si-Admin using LangChain.js and LangGraph.js. Implements LLM integration, RAG pipeline, tool calling, StateGraph orchestration, vector embeddings, hybrid search, memory consolidation, multi-agent system, streaming, human-in-the-loop, and observability.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with all new API routes compiled. npm run lint passes with 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings in unrelated UI files). No test framework installed - no unit tests to validate. No Dockerfile in project.
